context: Tests whether the agent applies mobile-first CSS architecture with correct design tokens, responsive grid using auto-fill, proper touch target sizing, and correct variant swatch hit area implementation for a commerce product catalog.

checklist.name: Mobile-first base styles
checklist.description: Base grid styles target small screens first, with min-width media queries used to enhance for larger screens (NOT max-width for narrowing down)

checklist.name: CSS custom properties
checklist.description: Spacing, touch target, and/or layout values are defined as CSS custom properties (CSS variables with -- prefix) rather than hard-coded magic numbers

checklist.name: Touch target token value
checklist.description: The touch target custom property or hard-coded value is 44px (matching WCAG 2.5.5 requirement)

checklist.name: Grid auto-fill pattern
checklist.description: The product grid uses `display: grid` with `repeat(auto-fill, ...)` so column count adjusts automatically without explicit per-breakpoint column counts

checklist.name: Grid minmax sizing
checklist.description: The grid uses `minmax(min(160px, 100%), 1fr)` (or equivalent min() formula) for the mobile base column size

checklist.name: Breakpoint values
checklist.description: Media query breakpoints used are 640px and/or 1024px (matching the sm/lg breakpoint spec), not arbitrary values like 600px or 900px

checklist.name: Image aspect ratio
checklist.description: Product card images use `aspect-ratio: 4/5` (portrait) and `object-fit: cover`

checklist.name: Global touch target rule
checklist.description: A CSS rule sets min-height and min-width of 44px on interactive elements (button, a, select, or [role=button]) globally

checklist.name: CTA button push to bottom
checklist.description: The Add to Cart button (or card CTA) uses `margin-top: auto` to push it to the bottom of the card flex container

checklist.name: Swatch hit area 44px
checklist.description: Color variant swatches have a 44px hit area (width: 44px; height: 44px) even if the visible circle is smaller

checklist.name: Swatch visual vs hit area
checklist.description: Swatch visual indicator is rendered smaller than 44px (e.g., via a ::before pseudo-element or inner element) while the click/tap target remains 44px

checklist.name: Image lazy loading
checklist.description: Product card images include `loading="lazy"` and have explicit `width` and `height` attributes to prevent layout shift
